main_word.definition: Any of the hard parts inside a human or animal that make up its frame.
main_word.definition_vi: Bất kỳ phần cứng nào bên trong cơ thể người hoặc động vật tạo nên bộ khung của nó.
main_word.example: He broke a bone in his leg.
main_word.example_vi: Anh ấy bị gãy một khúc xương ở chân.

sub_words.clue_for_game: A piece of furniture for sleep or rest.

details.full_definition: A large, rectangular piece of furniture, often with four legs, used for sleeping on.
details.full_definition_vi: Một món đồ nội thất lớn, hình chữ nhật, thường có bốn chân, dùng để ngủ.
details.example: He likes to have breakfast in bed.

details.full_definition: To put food in your mouth, chew it, and swallow it.

sub_words.clue_for_game: A set of physical and mental exercises designed to give you health and relax you.

details.full_definition: A system of exercises for your body and for controlling your breathing.

details.full_definition: The front part of a person's head from the forehead to the chin.

details.full_definition: The provision of what is necessary for the health, welfare, maintenance, and protection of someone or something.

details.example_vi: Anh ấy cần sự chăm sóc y tế đặc biệt.

main_word.definition: One of the parts of the body of a human or animal that is used for standing or walking.

details.full_definition: A minute opening in a surface, especially the skin or integument of an organism.
